Node.js
How It Works → Architecture

System design

Wterm is a node.js application. It takes user input and config files and produces zig + wasm core — vt100/vt220/xterm esca and results.

Input
User input
via CLI or config
Config files
.env / JSON
→
Wterm core
🔷 HTTP server setup examples/local/server.ts
🔷 HTTP server setup examples/ssh/server.ts
🔷 Application bootstrap examples/vite/src/main.ts
🔑 Required environment variables apps/docs/.env.example
data flows top → bottom
→
Output
Zig + WASM core — VT100/VT220/xterm esca
primary output
Results
stdout / return value
02 / 10
Wterm
setup guide
Overview
How It Works
Features
Stack
Files
Requirements
Install
Configure
Run
Recap
Stack
Node.js
Overview → Features

What it does

⚡
Feature 1
Zig + WASM core — VT100/VT220/xterm escape sequence parser compiled to a ~12 KB `.wasm` binary (release build)
🔧
Feature 2
DOM rendering — native text selection, clipboard, browser find, and screen reader support
🛡️
Feature 3
Dirty-row tracking — only touched rows are re-rendered each frame via `requestAnimationFrame`
📡
Feature 4
Themes — CSS custom properties with built-in Default, Solarized Dark, Monokai, and Light themes

Node.js
Overview → Project Structure

Key files

Familiarise yourself with these files — you'll reference them throughout setup.

🔷 examples/local/server.ts HTTP server setup key file
🔷 examples/ssh/server.ts HTTP server setup key file
🔷 examples/vite/src/main.ts Application bootstrap key file
🔑 apps/docs/.env.example Required environment variables
🔑 examples/markdown-streaming/.env.example Required environment variables
📄 examples/nextjs/CLAUDE.md Agent memory and instructions

Node.js
Setup → Clone & Install

Clone & install

Terminal
$git clone git clone https://github.com/vercel-labs/wterm.git
Cloning into 'wterm'...
✓ Clone complete
$cd wterm
$pnpm install
Installing dependencies...
✓ Dependencies installed

Node.js
Setup → Run

Start the app

Terminal
$pnpm run dev
✓ Server running and ready
🎉 You're up and running! Wterm is live.
